sections.paragraph: <entryFree id="n64069" key="*lukambi\s" type="main" opt="n" TEIform="entryFree"> <orth extent="full" lang="greek" opt="n" TEIform="orth">Λῠκαμβὶς</orth> <foreign lang="greek" TEIform="foreign">ἀρχή</foreign>, phrase used of the Polemarch by <bibl n="urn:cts:greekLit:tlg0434.tlg001:130" default="NO" TEIform="bibl"> <author TEIform="author">Cratin.</author> <biblScope TEIform="biblScope">130</biblScope></bibl>.</entryFree>
